task_completion.description: Verify the location and time are set correctly in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Stellarium 'Location' window showing South Africa, Latitude near -26.95 (or 26°57' S), Longitude near 24.73 (or 24°43' E), and Altitude 1200m. Also look for the 'Date and time' window showing 2024-11-01 and 22:00.

task_completion.description: Verify the atmosphere is disabled and both Azimuthal and Galactic grids are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Stellarium sky view or 'Sky and viewing options' window. The sky should be dark (no atmospheric scattering/glow). Two distinct sets of grid lines (Azimuthal and Galactic) should be visible across the sky.

task_completion.description: Verify the view is centered on the constellation Crux.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the constellation 'Crux' (the Southern Cross) visible in the center of the screen, potentially with its selection marker or label highlighted.

task_completion.description: Verify the location and display settings were saved to the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Stellarium 'Configuration' window (F2) being open with the 'Save settings' button clicked, or a brief on-screen notification indicating settings were saved.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot of the view was captured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an on-screen notification in Stellarium saying 'Screenshot saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium' or a file manager window showing a newly created image file in that directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the field planning document was created with the correct content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor window showing a file saved at '/home/ga/Desktop/beetle_field_plan.txt'. The text must include the location (South Africa), the date (November 1, 2024), the reference constellation (Crux), and a note confirming the Galactic Grid is enabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Stellarium graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Stellarium application open with its menus (Location, Date/Time, Sky options) being actively used, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the sky simulation reflects the requested changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main Stellarium view should visibly change to reflect the dark sky, grids, and the Crux constellation, proving the settings were actually applied to the simulation.

integrity.description: Verify the field plan document is a genuinely formatted note.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'beetle_field_plan.txt' should be written out as a planning document or list, not just a raw copy-paste of the entire prompt text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Latitude -26.95 degrees, Longitude 24.73 degrees. Target Date: 2024-11-01. Required Display Flags: Atmosphere disabled (flag_atmosphere=false), Azimuthal Grid enabled (flag_azimuthal_grid=true), Galactic Grid enabled (flag_galactic_grid=true). Field Plan Path: /home/ga/Desktop/beetle_field_plan.txt. Screenshots Directory: /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium (minimum 1 screenshot required).
